text.en: If your Army Faction is **WORLD EATERS**, at the start of the battle round, you can make a Blessings of Khorne roll. To do so, roll eight D6. You can then use those dice to activate up to two Blessings of Khorne (see below). Each Blessing of Khorne specifies the dice results it requires (where a number is specified, a double or triple of that value or higher is required). You can only activate each Blessing of Khorne once per battle round. Any unused dice from the Blessings of Khorne roll are then discarded. Once activated, each Blessing of Khorne applies to all units from your army with this ability until the end of the battle round.

**Example**: Ash makes a Blessings of Khorne roll, getting the following: 1, 2, 2, 2, 3, 4, 6, 6. First they use the two 6s to activate Warp Blades (which requires a double 5+ ), leaving the following dice: 1, 2, 2, 2, 3, 4. They then use the two 2s to activate Unbridled Bloodlust. Now that two Blessings of Khorne have been activated, no more can be activated and the remaining dice are discarded.
Unbridled Bloodlust
This unit has +1 to **charge rolls**.
Rage-Fuelled Invigoration
Each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".
Total Carnage

Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
Martial Excellence
Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.
Warp Blades
Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability
Decapitating Strikes
Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an **INFANTRY** unit, that attack has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

Each time a **WORLD EATERS** unit from your army makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic and add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

**WORLD EATERS POSSESSED** units from your army have the following ability:

**Brazen Fury:** In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model in this unit was **destroyed** as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6”. That **surge move** is a **Brazen Fury** **move**.

name.ja: アダマンチウムの雪崩

text.en: At the start of the Fight phase, if a friendly TERMINATOR SQUAD unit is engaged, make a Blessings of Khorne roll and use the results to activate one Blessing of Khorne. Until the end of the phase, that Blessing of Khorne is active for friendly TERMINATOR SQUAD units in addition to any other Blessings of Khorne that are currently active.
text.de: Wenn sich eine befreundete Terminatortrupp-Einheit zu Beginn der Nahkampfphase im Nahkampf befindet, führe einen Segen-des-­Khorne-Wurf aus und benutze die Ergebnisse, um einen Segen des Khorne zu aktivieren. Bis zum Ende der Phase ist jener Segen des ­Khorne zusätzlich zu anderen aktuell aktiven Segen des Khorne für befreundete Terminatortrupp-Einheiten aktiv.
text.es: Al inicio de la fase de combate, si una unidad ESCUADRA DE EXTERMINADORES amiga está trabada, haz una tirada de Bendiciones de Khorne y usa los resultados para activar 1 Bendición de Khorne. Hasta el final de la fase, esa Bendición de Khorne está activa para las unidades ESCUADRA DE EXTERMINADORES amigas además de cualquier otra Bendición de Khorne que esté activa actualmente.
text.fr: Au début de la phase de Combat, si une unité d'Escouade Terminator amie est engagée, faites un jet de Bénédictions de Khorne et utilisez le résultat pour activer une Bénédiction de Khorne. Jusqu'à la fin de la phase, cette Bénédiction de Khorne est active pour les unités d'Escouade Terminator amie en plus de toutes autres Bénédictions de Khorne qui sont actuellement actives.
text.it: All’inizio della fase di Combattimento, se un’unità SQUADRA TERMINATOR amica è ingaggiata, effettua un tiro Benedizioni di Khorne e usa i risultati per attivare una Benedizione di Khorne. Fino alla fine della fase quella Benedizione di Khorne è attiva per le unità SQUADRA TERMINATOR amiche in aggiunta a qualsiasi altra Benedizione di Khorne attiva al momento.
text.ja: 白兵フェイズ開始時、味方ターミネイター・スカッド・ユニットが接敵状態である場合、『コーン神の祝福』ロールを行い、その結果を使用して『コーン神の祝福』を1つ発動する。そのフェイズ終了時まで、味方ターミネイター・スカッド・ユニットは、現在発動中の他の『コーン神の祝福』の効果に加えて、その『コーン神の祝福』の効果も受ける。
text.ko: 백병전 페이즈 시작 시, 아군 터미네이터 분대 유닛이 교전 상태라면, 코온의 축복 굴림을 수행하여 그 굴림 값으로 코온의 축복 하나를 활성화합니다. 페이즈가 종료될 때까지, 기존에 활성화되어 있는 코온의 축복에 추가로 그 코온의 축복이 아군 터미네이터 분대 유닛에 활성화됩니다.
text.zh: 在近战阶段开始时，若一个己方终结者小队单位处于交战状态，进行一次恐虐赐福掷骰并使用相应结果激活一个恐虐赐福。在该阶段结束前，除了任意其他已经生效的恐虐赐福外，那个恐虐赐福也对该终结者小队单位生效。

text.en:
Each time a **BLOOD LEGIONS** or **WORLD EATERS** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Blood Tithe point (BTP). At the start of the Command phase, you can spend one or more of your BTP to activate one of the following abilities until the end of the battle:

■ **Enraged Abjuration [2BTP]**
**BLOOD LEGIONS** and **WORLD EATERS** models from your army have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

■ **Daemonic Rage [3BTP]**
Melee weapons equipped by **BLOOD LEGIONS** units from your army have the **[LANCE]** ability.

■ **Boon of Blood [4BTP]**
**BLOOD LEGIONS** units from your army have a 4+ invulnerable save.

■ **Might of Khorne [5BTP]**
**BLOOD LEGIONS** units from your army gain the Blessings of Khorne ability.

At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Idols of Khorne abilities listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that ability is active and its effects apply to all **WORLD EATERS TITANIC** and **WORLD EATERS MONSTER** units from your army. You can only select each Idols of Khorne ability once per battle.
Idol of Infinite Rage (Aura)

While a friendly **JAKHALS** or **GOREMONGERS** unit is within 6" of this model (or within 9" if this model is **TITANIC**), each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
Idol of Burning Wrath (Aura)

While a friendly **JAKHALS** or **GOREMONGERS** unit is within 6" of this model (or within 9" if this model is **TITANIC**), add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.
Idol of Blessed Blood (Aura)
While a friendly **JAKHALS** or **GOREMONGERS** unit is within 6" of this model (or within 9" if this model is **TITANIC**), models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Each time a **WORLD EATERS** unit from your army disembarks from a **TRANSPORT,** until the end of the turn, add 1 to Charge rolls made for that unit and that unit’s melee weapons have the **[LANCE]** ability.

Friendly Daemon Vehicle units have the following ability: Terror of Khorne: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit engaged with this unit. That enemy unit makes a battle‑shock roll, with -1 to that battle‑shock roll. You cannot select the same enemy unit for this effect more than once per phase. This detachment has the onslaught tag and cannot be taken with another onslaught detachment.
text.de: Befreundete Dämon-Fahrzeug-Einheiten haben die folgende Fähigkeit: Schreckensherrschaft des Khorne: Zu Beginn der Nahkampf­phase kannst du eine feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit dieser Einheit wählen. Jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus. Du kannst dieselbe feindliche Einheit nicht mehr als einmal pro Phase für diesen Effekt wählen. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Ansturm und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Ansturm gewählt werden.
text.es: Las unidades Vehículo Daemon amigas tienen esta habilidad: Terror de Khorne: Al inicio de la fase de combate, puedes elegir 1 unidad enemiga trabada con esta unidad. Esa unidad enemiga debe hacer una tirada de acobardamiento con un -1. No puedes elegir la misma unidad enemiga para este efecto más de una vez por fase.
text.fr: Les unités de Véhicule Démon amies ont l’aptitude suivante : Terreur de Khorne : Au début de la phase de Combat, vous pouvez choisir une unité ennemie engagée avec cette unité. L'unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet. Vous ne pouvez pas choisir la même unité pour cet effet plus d'une fois par phase
text.it: Le unità Veicolo Demone amiche hanno la seguente abilità: Terrore di Khorne: all’inizio della fase di combattimento puoi scegliere un’unità nemica ingaggiata con questa unità. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi, con -1 a quel tiro per i traumi. Non puoi scegliere la stessa unità per questo effetto più di una volta per fase. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Offensiva e non può essere preso con nessun altro distaccamento Offensiva.
text.ja: 味方ディーモン・ビークル・ユニットは以下のアビリティを持つ： コーンの恐怖：白兵フェイズ開始時、自軍はこのユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットを1個選択してもよい。その敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。その戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。この効果で同一のユニットを選ぶことができるのは、各フェイズにつき1回だけである。
text.ko: 아군 데몬 기체 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 코온의 공포: 백병전 시작 시, 이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛을 하나 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 적 유닛이 전투충격 굴림을 수행하며, 그 전투충격 굴림에 -1을 적용합니다. 동일한 적 유닛은 페이즈당 한 번만 이 능력의 대상으로 지정될 수 있습니다.
text.zh: 己方恶魔载具单位拥有以下技能： 恐虐的威慑：在近战阶段开始时，您可以选择一个与该单位处于交战状态的敌方单位。那个敌方单位需要进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，并且那次战斗震慑掷骰结果 -1。同一阶段中您不能多次选择同一个敌方单位。

text.en:
When a friendly World Eaters Character unit (excluding EPIC HERO units) is selected to fight, that unit's Character models' melee attacks can have:
  • [Cleave 1].
  • Or: +1 AP.
text.de:
Wenn eine befreundete World-Eaters-Charaktermodell-Einheit (ausgenommen EPISCHER-HELD-Einheiten) zum Kämpfen gewählt wird, können Nahkampfattacken der Charaktermodelle jener Einheit:
  • [Spalten 1].
  • oder: +1 DS haben.
text.es:
Cuando una unidad Personaje Devoradores de Mundos amiga (salvo HÉROE ÉPICO) se elija para combatir, los ataques de combate de las miniaturas Personaje de esa unidad tienen:
  • [Tajar 1].
  • O: +1 a FP.
text.fr:
Quand une unité de Personnage World Eater amie (unités de Héros Épique exclues) est choisie pour combattre, les attaques de mêlée des figurines de Personnage de cette unité peuvent avoir :
  • [Abattage 1].
  • Ou : +1 en PA.
text.it:
Quando un’unità Personaggio dei World Eaters amica (escluse le unità EROE EPICO) viene scelta per combattere, gli attacchi da mischia dei modelli di Personaggio di quell’unità possono avere:
  • [Falciare 1].
  • Oppure: +1 VP.
text.ja:
味方ワールドイーター・キャラクター・ユニット（伝説的英雄・ユニットを除く）が白兵を宣言した時、その味方ユニットのキャラクター・兵の白兵攻撃は以下が可能になる：
  • ［蹂躙1］を持つ。
  • または： 【貫】に+1の修正を受ける。
text.ko:
아군 월드 이터 캐릭터 유닛(서사적 영웅 유닛 제외)이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 그 유닛에 속한 캐릭터 모델의 백병전 공격에 다음을 부여합니다.
  • [베어가르기 1].
  • 또는, 관통 +1.
text.zh:
在一个己方吞世者角色单位（史诗英雄单位除外）被选择进行近战时，那个单位中角色模型的近战攻击拥有：
  • [劈砍 1]。
  • 或者：+1 AP。

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and that made a charge move this turn.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

fluff.en: Hack and slash, rend and tear, dismember and eviscerate. Kill! Kill! KILL!

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS POSSESSED** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to an enemy model, if your unit has the **EIGHTBOUND** keyword and that enemy model is not a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE,** add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack. If your unit has the **EXALTED EIGHTBOUND** keyword and that enemy model is **a MONSTER** or **VEHICLE,** add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack instead.

fluff.en: Infernal mutations grant the possessed daemonic strength.

target.en: One **BLOOD LEGIONS** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your Fight phase.

effect.en: Select one friendly **WORLD EATERS** unit within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in your **WORLD EATERS** unit have the **[LANCE]** ability. If the Daemonic Rage ability is active for your army, then until the end of the phase those melee weapons also have the **[TWIN-LINKED]** ability.

fluff.en: The blood legions surge forth from the Warp in a howling tide of carnage, butchering all in their path.

target.en: One **BLOOD LEGIONS** unit from your army that is within 6" of a friendly **WORLD EATERS** unit that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your **WORLD EATERS** unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If the Boon of Blood ability is active for your army, then until the end of the phase, models in your **WORLD EATERS** unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: The weapons of Khorne’s craven foes are turned aside by empyric energies.

target.en: One **JAKHALS** or **GOREMONGERS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to fight, when determining which models in it are eligible to fight, any models in your unit that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

fluff.en: In their feverish desire to slaughter, Khornate cultists scramble and surge to land blows upon the foe.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: The depths of their fury lend the devoted of Khorne resilience. Mere flesh wounds will not stay the wrath of the World Eaters.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS POSSESSED** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Possession lends great resilience.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS POSSESSED** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Even as their host’s form is destroyed, Khorne’s daemons strive to strike a final, vengeful blow.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS** unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Khorne cares not from whence the blood flows, only that it does. The deaths of his own devoted are fitting offerings.

target.en: That **BLOOD LEGIONS** or **WORLD EATERS** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **BLOOD LEGIONS** or **WORLD EATERS** unit from your army has fought, and one or more enemy **CHARACTER** or **MONSTER** models were destroyed as a result of those attacks.

effect.en: You gain D3BTP and you can then spend one or more BTP you have to activate one of the Blood Tithe abilities.

fluff.en: Khome’s followers seek to claim the skulls of the foe’s mightiest champions.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS MONSTER** or **WORLD EATERS TITANIC** unit from your army that was just destroyed by an enemy unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, each time a model in a **JAKHALS** or **GOREMONGERS** unit from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: The demise of this titanic being showers nearby cultists in blood and viscera, inspiring vengeful fury.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS MONSTER** or **WORLD EATERS TITANIC** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Select the Idol of Infinite Rage, Idol of Burning Wrath or Idol of Blessed Blood. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Idols of Khorne ability is active for your unit instead of any other Idols of Khorne ability that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that ability this battle.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

fluff.en: The greatest idols wrought in Khorne’s infernal name bestow myriad blessings upon his faithful.

target.en: That **WORLD EATERS** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **WORLD EATERS** unit from your army destroys a **CHARACTER** or **MONSTER** model.

effect.en: Make a Blessings of Khorne roll and use the results to activate one Blessing of Khorne. Until the end of the battle round, that Blessing of Khorne is active in addition to any other Blessings of Khorne that are currently active.

fluff.en: The skulls of mighty champions and monstrous foes make a fitting tribute to the Blood God.

target.en: That **KHORNE BERZERKERS** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, ,just after a **KHORNE BERZERKERS** unit from your army is selected to Advance.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Those who fight for Khorne are driven to even greater depths of rage, surging towards the foe in a barely controlled tide of bloodthirsty savagery.

target.en: One **KHORNE BERZERKERS** unit from your army that can make a **surge move** as a result of those attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Do not roll a D6 to determine how far models in your unit can move when they make a **surge move**. Instead, when making a **surge move**, those models can move up to 8".

fluff.en: The incessant pounding of the Butcher’s Nails drives the World Eaters forward, desperate to salve their agony with blood and gore.

target.en: One **EXALTED EIGHTBOUND** unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

restrictions.en: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

fluff.en: Tearing through the fabric of reality, the Exalted Eightbound appear as if from nowhere to loom over their terrified victims.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS POSSESSED** unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declare a charge this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through enemy models (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but, unless that move was a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

fluff.en: Possessed warriors surge over and through their allies, swatting lessers aside in their eagerness to slaughter foes.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS POSSESSED** unit from your army.

when.en: Your opponent’s Command phase.

effect.en: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

fluff.en: Enthralled warriors fall upon their victims in horrifying displays of carnage, sending panic rippling through the enemy ranks.

target.en: One **BLOODLETTERS** unit from your army that is in Reserves.

when.en: Any phase, when the last model in a unit is destroyed, before removing it from play. (If that unit is a **TRANSPORT**, any units embarked within that **TRANSPORT** model must disembark first.)

effect.en: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 9" of that destroyed model and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, then remove the destroyed model from play.

restrictions.en: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle round.

fluff.en: As blood is spilt, the veil between reality and the Warp is eroded.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Select one friendly **BLOOD LEGIONS** unit within 6" of your unit. One destroyed **MOUNTED** model, up to D3 destroyed **BEAST** models, or up to D6 destroyed **INFANTRY** models are returned to that **BLOOD LEGIONS** unit with their full wounds remaining.

restrictions.en: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed **CHARACTER** models to Attached units.

fluff.en: As the bloodshed increases, seemingly endless tides of daemons spill from the Warp to bolster the ranks of the blood legions.

target.en: One **BLOOD LEGIONS** unit from your army that is on the battlefield and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: With their foes rent asunder, Khomate daemons return to the chaos of the Warp, awaiting the next massacre to strike again.

name.en: In the Shadow of Brass Idols

target.en: One **JAKHALS** or **GOREMONGERS** unit from your army that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within 6" of one or more friendly **WORLD EATERS MONSTER** units, or within 9" of one or more friendly **WORLD EATERS TITANIC** units, your unit has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

fluff.en: Emboldened by blood-slick and skull-laden idols of their dark god, mortal cultists shrug off injury.

target.en: One **JAKHALS** or **GOREMONGERS** unit from your army.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that model’s unit is within 6" of one or more friendly **WORLD EATERS MONSTER** units, or within 9" of one or more friendly **WORLD EATERS TITANIC** units, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

fluff.en: To fail Khorne is to invite a terrible fate.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS INFANTRY** unit from your army and one friendly **TRANSPORT** that it is able to embark within.

when.en: End of the Fight phase.

effect.en: If your **WORLD EATERS INFANTRY** unit is wholly within 6" of that **TRANSPORT**, it can embark within it.

fluff.en: Having slaughtered their foes, the World Eaters mount up once more to seek new victims.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS VEHICLE** model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

fluff.en: Few obstacles can prevent the World Eaters’ eager armoured formations from reaching their prey.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS RHINO** model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: One **WORLD EATERS** unit embarked within your **RHINO** can disembark. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of your **RHINO** and can be set up within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Propelled by their blood lust, the World Eaters spill from their transports and surge towards the foe.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS RHINO** model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a **WORLD EATERS** unit disembarks from that model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

fluff.en: With their transports growling with hunger, the World Eaters emerge rapidly to crash headlong into their enemies.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS VEHICLE** model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your model can make a Normal move of up to 6".

restrictions.en: A unit cannot be targeted by this Stratagem and the Fury Unleashed Stratagem in the same phase.

fluff.en: Incoming fire crashes against corrupted armour, drawing the target closer.

target.en: One **WORLD EATERS RHINO** model from your army that has one or more wounds remaining and was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: One **KHORNE BERZERKERS** unit embarked within your model can make a **disembark move** and then make a **surge move** of up to D6+2".

restrictions.en: A unit cannot be targeted by this Stratagem and the Unrelenting Advance Stratagem in the same phase.

fluff.en: Khorne Berzerkers react to incoming fire, disembarking to release their pent-up fury.

target.en: One **JAKHALS** unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.

restrictions.en: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed **CHARACTER** units to Attached units.

fluff.en: As the bloodshed increases, Jakhals are drawn to the fight like hungry scavengers to a kill.

target.en: That <k>Terminator Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ターミネイター・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Terminator Squad unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Terminatortrupp-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Escuadra de Exterminadores amiga se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité d’Escouade Terminator amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Squadra Terminator amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方<k>ターミネイター・スカッド</k>・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 터미네이터 분대 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方终结者小队单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have +1 A.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen +1 a A.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont +1 en A.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno +1 A.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃の【数】は+1の修正を受ける。
effect.zh: 该己方单位的近战攻击拥有 +1 A。

fluff.en: Fighting with lunatic fierceness, these elite killers hack their victims limb from limb in a blizzard of blows.
fluff.de: Diese elitären Schlächter kämpfen mit wahnhafter Raserei, um ihre Opfer in einem Wirbel aus Hieben in Stücke zu schlagen.
fluff.es: Luchando con una ferocidad demencial, estos asesinos de élite descuartizan a sus víctimas en una tormenta de golpes.
fluff.fr: Luttant avec une férocité maniaque, ces tueurs d’élite démembrent leurs victimes dans une pluie de coups.
fluff.it: Questi assassini scelti combattono con folle ferocia e fanno a pezzi le vittime con turbini di colpi.
fluff.ja: この精鋭の殺戮者たちは狂乱とも言うべき狂暴さで戦い、猛烈な連撃によって犠牲者の手足を切り裂いていく。
fluff.ko: 넘쳐나는 광포함으로 전투에 임하는 이 정예 살육병들은 맹격의 눈보라가 되어 적의 사지를 도륙한다.
fluff.zh: 这些精英杀手们的战斗方式极为狂乱，在连续攻击中将敌人大卸八块。

target.en: That <k>Terminator Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ターミネイター・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Terminator Squad unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Terminatortrupp-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Escuadra de Exterminadores amiga se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité d’Escouade Terminator amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Squadra Terminator amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方<k>ターミネイター・スカッド</k>・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 터미네이터 분대 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方终结者小队单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s attacks that target a Monster/Vehicle unit have +1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit gegen eine Einheit Monster-/Fahrzeug-Einheit haben +1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques de tu unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad Monstruo/Vehículo tienen +1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques de votre unité qui ciblent une unité de Monstre/Véhicule ont +1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità Mostro/Veicolo hanno +1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: そのユニットの攻撃がモンスター/ビークル・ユニットを対象としている場合、ウーンズロールに+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 공격이 괴수/기체유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 그 공격에 타격 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位对凶兽/载具单位进行的攻击的致伤掷骰 +1。

fluff.en: The greater and more terrible the enemies these warriors face in battle, the mightier the trophies they can take in the Blood God’s name.
fluff.de: Je größer und schrecklicher die Feinde sind, denen sich diese Krieger im Kampf gegenübersehen, umso mächtiger ist auch die Trophäe, die sie im Namen des Blutgottes ergattern können.
fluff.es: Cuanto más grandes y terribles sean los enemigos a los que se enfrentan estos guerreros en batalla, más poderosos serán los trofeos que podrán obtener en nombre del Dios de la Sangre.
fluff.fr: Plus les ennemis que ces guerriers affrontent sont terribles, plus grands seront les trophées qu’ils prendront au nom du Dieu du Sang.
fluff.it: Più grandi e spaventosi sono i nemici da affrontare, più prestigiosi sono i trofei che questi guerrieri possono mietere nel nome del Dio del Sangue.
fluff.ja: この戦士が戦場で対峙する敵が強大で恐ろしいほど、流血神の名の下に勝ち取れる戦利品は、より壮大なものとなる。
fluff.ko: 전투에서 더 강대하고 끔찍한 적을 마주할수록 피의 신에게 더 값진 공물을 바칠 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 这些战士们面对的敌人越是强大可怕，他们能以血神之名取得的战利品就越卓越。

target.en: That <k>Daemon Vehicle</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ディーモン・ビークル</k>・ユニット

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Daemon Vehicle unit is selected to attack.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase oder die Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Dämon-Fahrzeug-Einheit zum Attackieren gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Vehículo Daemon amiga se elige para atacar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Véhicule Démon amie est choisie pour attaquer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Veicolo Demone amica viene scelta per attaccare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、味方ディーモン・ビークル・ユニットが攻撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 데몬 기체 유닛이 공격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段或在近战阶段中，当一个己方恶魔载具单位被选择进行攻击时。

effect.en:
Your unit’s attacks can ignore modifiers to:
  • BS.
  • WS.
  • Hit rolls and wound rolls.
effect.de:
Attacken deiner Einheit können folgende Modifikatoren ignorieren:
  • BF.
  • KG.
  • Trefferwürfe und Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es:
Los ataques de tu unidad pueden ignorar los modificadores a:
  • La HP.
  • La HP.
  • Las tiradas para impactar y las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de votre unité peuvent ignorer les modificateurs :
  • À la CT.
  • À la CC.
  • Aux jets de touche et aux jets de blessure.
effect.it:
Gli attacchi della tua unità possono ignorare i modificatori a:
  • AB.
  • AC.
  • Tiri per colpire e tiri per ferire.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの攻撃は、以下に対する修正を無視してもよい：
  • 【射】。
  • 【接】。
  • ヒットロールとウーンズロール。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 공격이 다음 사항에 적용되는 보정을 무시할 수 있습니다.
  • 사격
  • 근접
  • 명중 굴림 및 타격 굴림
effect.zh:
您的单位可以忽略以下修正：
  • BS。
  • WS。
  • 命中掷骰和致伤掷骰。

fluff.en: So perfect a state of supernatural rage does this ironclad entity exist in that nothing can distract it from its single‑minded slaughter.
fluff.de: Diese eisengebundene Monstrosität befindet sich in einem derart perfekten Zustand übernatürlicher Raserei, dass sie durch nichts von ihrem geradlinigen Gemetzel abgelenkt werden kann.
fluff.es: Esta entidad acorazada posee un estado de furia sobrenatural tan perfecto que nada puede distraerla de su obstinada masacre.
fluff.fr: Cette entité cuirassée est dans un tel état de rage surnaturelle que rien ne peut l’éloigner du massacre.
fluff.it: Lo stato di rabbia sovrannaturale in cui versa questa entità corazzata è talmente perfetto che nulla può distrarla dal massacro.
fluff.ja: この鋼鉄に身を包んだディーモンは、超常的な激怒を完全に体現しており、いかなる妨害を行おうとも、一心不乱な虐殺を止めることなどできない。
fluff.ko: 초월적인 분노가 완벽한 경지에 이르러 이 갑주를 두른 존재는 흔들림 없는 명징으로 학살을 일으킨다.
fluff.zh: 这个被钢铁包裹的异常实体处于一种完美的狂怒状态，没有任何事物能够阻碍它纯粹的杀戮欲望。

target.en: That <k>Daemon Vehicle</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ディーモン・ビークル</k>・ユニット

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly unengaged Daemon Vehicle unit (excluding Titanic units) has shot.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, nachdem eine feindliche Einheit auf eine befreundete Dämon-Fahrzeug-Einheit (ausgenommen titanische Einheiten) geschossen hat, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga que haya tomado como blanco una unidad Vehículo Daemon amiga no trabada (salvo Titánica) haya disparado.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie qui a ciblé une unité de Véhicule Démon amie non engagée (unités Titanesques exclues) a tiré.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, dopo che un’unità nemica che aveva come bersaglio un’unità Veicolo Demone amica non ingaggiata (escluse le unità Titaniche) ha tirato.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、非接敵状態の味方ディーモン・ビークル・ユニット（巨大兵器・ユニットを除く）を攻撃対象にした射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 대상으로 지정한 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 데몬 기체 유닛(거대 유닛 제외)에게 사격을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段中，在一个敌方单位选择了一个不处于交战状态的己方恶魔载具单位(巨型单位除外)为目标并完成射击时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine Ansturmbewegung von bis zu W6" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento súbito de hasta 1D6".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement d’élan de D6" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento d’impeto di massimo D6".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D6mvまでの進撃移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 최대 D6"의 쇄도 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D6" 的迸发移动。

fluff.en: Incensed by the cowardly affront of the foe, this war engine charges down those who would dare fire upon it.
fluff.de: Diese Kriegsmaschine ist ob der feigen Beleidigung durch den Feind erzürnt und stürmt auf jene los, die es wagen, sie zu beschießen.
fluff.es: Indignada por la cobarde afrenta del enemigo, esta máquina de guerra arremete contra quienes se atreven a disparar contra ella.
fluff.fr: Nargué par la lâcheté de l’ennemi, cet engin de guerre charge ceux qui ont l’affront de lui tirer dessus.
fluff.it: Aizzata dall’affronto del nemico, questa macchina da guerra carica a testa bassa chiunque osi aprire il fuoco su di essa.
fluff.ja: この兵器は敵の怯懦な行いに怒りを昂らせる。そして、遠くから砲撃を行ってくる敵に対して敢然と襲い掛かるのだ。
fluff.ko: 적의 비겁한 작태에 격분한 이 전쟁 병기는 감히 자기에게 총구를 겨눈 이들을 향해 돌진한다.
fluff.zh: 这个战争机器被敌人的懦弱反抗激怒，向胆敢攻击它的弱者发起冲锋。

target.en: That <k>Daemon Vehicle</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ディーモン・ビークル</k>・ユニット

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Daemon Vehicle unit is selected to move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Dämon-Fahrzeug-Einheit zum Bewegen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Vehículo Daemon amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Véhicule Démon amie est choisie pour se déplacer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Veicolo Demone amica viene scelta per muoversi.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方ディーモン・ビークル・ユニットが移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 데몬 기체 유닛이 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方恶魔载具单位被选择进行移动时。

effect.en: Your unit has <k>Mobile</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは<k>高機動</k>を持つ。

fluff.en: Like a runaway engine of destruction, this Khornate war machine bulldozes a path through even the densest terrain in its urgency to reach the foe.
fluff.de: Wie eine rasende Zerstörungsmaschine donnert dieser Messingkoloss des Khorne selbst durch das dichteste Gelände, so gierig ist er danach, den Feind zu erreichen.
fluff.es: Como una máquina de destrucción desbocada, esta máquina de guerra de Khorne se abre paso incluso en el terreno más denso en su afán por alcanzar al enemigo.
fluff.fr: Tel un engin de destruction hors de contrôle, cette machine de guerre khornienne ouvre une voie à travers les terrains les plus denses dans son impatience d’atteindre l’ennemi.
fluff.it: Pur di raggiungere il nemico, questa macchina da guerra khornita si apre un sentiero persino nei terreni più fitti, come se fosse una macchina di distruzione impazzita.
fluff.ja: このコーンの兵器は、破壊そのものが暴走するかのごとく、酷く込み入った地形さえも薙ぎ倒しながら、敵に向かって直進していく。
fluff.ko: 파괴를 몰고 오는 폭주 전차처럼, 코온 전쟁 병기는 한시라도 빨리 적에게 근접하고자 그 어떤 고밀도 지형도 불도저처럼 뚫고 지나가 버린다.
fluff.zh: 宛若一架失控的毁灭引擎，这台恐虐战争机器势不可挡地在最密集的崎岖地形中强行开辟出一条通路，只为以最急切的姿态直扑敌阵。

target.en: That <k>World Eaters Character</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ワールドイーター・キャラクター</k>・ユニット

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly World Eaters Character unit (excluding EPIC HERO units) suffers a mortal wound.
when.de: Beliebige Phase, wenn eine befreundete World-Eaters-Charaktermodell-Einheit (ausgenommen Epischer-Held-Einheiten) eine tödliche Verwundung erleidet
when.es: En cualquier fase, cuando una unidad Personaje Devoradores de Mundos amiga (salvo HÉROE ÉPICO) sufra una herida mortal.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité de <k>Personnage World Eater</k> amie (unités de <k>Héros Épique</k> exclues) subit une ou plusieurs blessures mortelles.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità Personaggio dei World Eaters amica (escluse le unità EROE EPICO) subisce una ferita mortale.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方ワールドイーター・キャラクター・ユニット（伝説的英雄・ユニットを除く）が致命的ダメージを受けた時。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 월드 이터 캐릭터 유닛(서사적 영웅 유닛 제외)이 치명상을 입을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方吞世者角色单位 (史诗英雄单位除外) 受到一处致命伤时。

effect.en: Your unit has Feel No Pain 4+ against mortal wounds.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat Verletzungen ignorieren 4+ gegen tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene No hay dolor 4+ contra heridas mortales.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Insensible à la Douleur 4+ contre les blessures mortelles.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Insensibile al Dolore 4+ contro le ferite mortali.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは致命的ダメージに対する『痛みを知らぬ者4+』を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位针对致命伤拥有不觉疼痛 4+。

fluff.en: Those who feel Khorne’s blessings burning through their bodies and minds can shrug off hostile witchery with the force of their hate-fuelled contempt.
fluff.de: Wer den Segen des Khorne in Leib und Seele brennen spürt, kann feindselige Hexerei leicht mit dem schieren Willen hasserfüllter Verachtung abschütteln.
fluff.es: Quienes sienten las bendiciones de Khorne quemando sus cuerpos y mentes pueden ignorar la brujería hostil con la fuerza de su desprecio alimentado por el odio.
fluff.fr: Ceux qui sentent les bienfaits de Khorne battre dans leur corps et leur esprit peuvent ignorer la sorcellerie hostile grâce à la force de leur hargne.
fluff.it: Chi si sente pervaso nel corpo e nell’anima dalle ardenti benedizioni di Khorne riesce a ignorare le stregonerie ostili grazie solo al disprezzo che nutre.
fluff.ja: コーンの加護にその身も精神も焦がす者たちは、憎悪に満ちた軽蔑の衝動とともに、敵の妖術を弾き返す。
fluff.ko: 코온의 은총이 정신과 육체에 타들어 가듯이 흘러들면 위협적인 사술조차 달아오른 증오심만으로 뿌리쳐낼 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 那些感受着恐虐赐福在身心之中熊熊燃烧之人，仅凭那由仇恨所激发的蔑视之力，便能将敌对的巫术尽数弹开。

target.en: That <k>World Eaters Character</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ワールドイーター・キャラクター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly World Eaters Character unit (excluding EPIC HERO units) is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete World-Eaters-Charaktermodell-Einheit (ausgenommen Epischer-Held-Einheiten) zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Personaje Devoradores de Mundos amiga (salvo HÉROE ÉPICO) se elija para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de <k>Personnage World Eater</k> amie (unité de <k>Héros Épiques</k> exclues) est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Personaggio dei World Eaters amica (escluse le unità EROE EPICO) viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方ワールドイーター・キャラクター・ユニット（伝説的英雄・ユニットを除く）が白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 월드 이터 캐릭터 유닛(서사적 영웅 유닛 제외)이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方吞世者角色单位 (史诗英雄单位除外) 被选择进行近战时。

effect.en:
Your unit's Character models' melee attacks have:
  • +1 A.
  • +2 S.
effect.es:
Los ataques de combate de la miniatura Personaje de tu unidad tienen:
  • +1 a A.
  • +2 a S.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de mêlée des figurines de Personnage de votre unité ont :
  • +1 A.
  • +2 en F.
effect.it:
Gli attacchi da mischia dei modelli di Personaggio della tua unità hanno:
  • +1 A.
  • +2 Fo.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニット内のキャラクター・兵の白兵攻撃は以下を持つ：
  • 【数】+1。
  • 【攻】+2。
effect.ko:
이 유닛에 속한 캐릭터 모델의 백병전 공격에 다음을 적용합니다:
  • 공격 +1
  • 위력 +2
effect.zh:
该己方单位中角色模型的近战攻击拥有：
  • +1 A。
  • +2 S。

fluff.en: Feeling that the Blood God’s eye must surely be sweeping the field of war, his champions strive with wild ferocity to prove themselves.
fluff.de: Die Champions des Blutgottes spüren seinen Blick auf dem Schlachtfeld ruhen und streben mit brutaler Wildheit danach, sich zu beweisen.
fluff.es: Al sentir que la mirada del Dios de la Sangre seguramente esté sobre la batalla, sus campeones se esfuerzan con ferocidad salvaje por demostrar su valía.
fluff.fr: Sentant le regard du Dieu du Sang qui balaye le champ de bataille, ce champion laisse libre cours à sa férocité pour prouver sa valeur.
fluff.it: Sicuri che lo sguardo del Dio del Sangue sia fisso sul campo di battaglia, questi campioni vengono pervasi dalla brama di dimostrarsi degni.
fluff.ja: 血の神が戦場を見守っていると信じてやまぬ筆頭戦士たちは、その寵愛を得るべく野獣のごとき獰猛さで己の力を誇示する。
fluff.ko: 분명 피의 신이 전장을 지켜볼지니, 이 용사는 자신의 가치를 증명하고자 무시무시한 기백으로 싸워나간다.
fluff.zh: 在感受到血神之眼转移到战场后，勇士们变得更加狂乱，渴望证明自己。

name.ja: 怯懦なるものを罰せよ

target.en: That <k>World Eaters Character</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ワールドイーター・キャラクター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent's Movement phase, when a unit is selected to make a fall-back move, if that unit is engaged with a friendly World Eaters Character unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen, und sich jene Einheit im Nahkampf mit einer befreundeten World-Eaters-Charaktermodell-Einheit befindet
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder, si esa unidad está trabada con una unidad Personaje Devoradores de Mundos amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite, si l’unité choisie est engagée avec une unité de Personnage World Eater amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento, se quell’unità è ingaggiata con un’unità Personaggio dei World Eaters amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、味方ワールドイーター・キャラクター・ユニットと接敵状態であるユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때, 그 유닛이 아군 월드 이터 캐릭터 유닛과 교전 상태인 경우.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时，且那个单位与一个己方吞世者角色单位处于交战状态。

effect.en: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a fall-back move, that enemy unit must use the desperate escape mode. If that enemy unit is battle-shocked, -1 from those hazard rolls.
effect.de: Wenn eine feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit deiner Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen, muss jene Einheit den Modus verzweifelte Flucht benutzen. Wenn jene feindliche Einheit erschüttert ist, hat sie -1 auf jene Risikowürfe.
effect.es: Siempre que una unidad enemiga trabada con tu unidad se elija para hacer un movimiento de retroceder, esa unidad enemiga debe usar el modo de huida desesperada. Si esa unidad enemiga está acobardada, resta 1 a esas tiradas de riesgo.
effect.fr: Quand une unité ennemie engagée avec votre unité est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite, l’unité ennemie doit utiliser le mode fuite désespérée. Si l’unité ennemie est ébranlée, elle a -1 à ces jets de risque.
effect.it: Quando un’unità nemica ingaggiata con la tua unità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento, quell’unità nemica deve usare la modalità fuga disperata. Se quell’unità nemica è Traumatizzata, -1 a quei tiri pericolo.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットが退却移動を行った時、その敵ユニットは決死の脱出モードを使用しなければならない。その敵ユニットが戦闘ショック状態である場合、それらの危機ロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛 하나가 후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 그 적 유닛은 반드시 필사적인 탈출 하부 유형을 선택해야 합니다. 그 적 유닛이 전투충격 상태라면, 위험 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在一个与您的单位处于交战状态的敌方单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时，那个敌方单位必须使用狼狈逃亡模式。如果那个敌方单位处于战斗震慑状态，那么进行的危险掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: The Blood God is said to detest cowards. Meting out punishment to such degenerates is believed to be a sure way to win his favour.
fluff.de: Der Blutgott verabscheut Feiglinge. Solch verkommene Kreaturen zu bestrafen, ist ein sicherer Weg, seine Gunst zu erlangen.
fluff.es: El Dios de la Sangre detesta a los cobardes. Castigar a semejantes degenerados es una forma segura de obtener su favor y bendición.
fluff.fr:
Le Dieu du Sang est réputé pour sa méprise des
pleutres. Châtier ces êtres indignes est un moyen
sûr de gagner sa faveur.
fluff.it: Si dice che il Dio del Sangue detesti i codardi. Punire questi degenerati è un modo sicuro di ottenere il favore del nume e i suoi cruenti doni.
fluff.ja: 血の神は怯懦を嫌悪するという。怖気立つ者らに罰を下すことこそ、その神から恩寵を受ける確実な方法と信じられている。
fluff.ko: 피의 신은 겁쟁이를 질색한다. 그런 덜떨어진 것들에게 심판의 철퇴를 내리치는 것이야말로 그의 총애를 얻는 지름길이라 한다.
fluff.zh: 据说血神十分憎恨懦夫。对这样的弱者进行惩罚一定能够获得血神的青睐和祝福。

name.es: Ira más allá de la razón

target.en: That <k>Terminator Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ターミネイター・スカッド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting Phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Terminator Squad</k> unit.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Terminatortrupp</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Escuadra de Exterminadores</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité d’<k>Escouade Terminator</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità <k>Squadra Terminator</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>ターミネイター・スカッド</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>터미네이터 분대</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>终结者小队</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Ranged attacks that target your unit have -1 D until that enemy unit has attacked.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken gegen deine Einheit haben -1 SW, bis jene feindliche Einheit attackiert hat.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia que tomen como blanco tu unidad tienen -1 a D hasta que esa unidad enemiga haya atacado.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir qui ciblent votre unité ont -1 en D jusqu’à ce que cette unité ennemie ait attaqué.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità hanno -1 Da finché quell’unità nemica non ha attaccato.
effect.ja: その敵ユニットの攻撃が終わるまでの間、その自軍ユニットを対象とする射撃攻撃は【ダ】に-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 적 유닛이 공격을 종료할 때까지 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 원거리 공격에 피해 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 直到那个敌方单位完成攻击前，针对您的单位进行的远程攻击的 D -1。

fluff.en: So seized by furious bloodlust are these killers that they fight on through even the most grievous mortal wounds.
fluff.de: Diese Ungeheuer sind derart von ihrer tobenden Blutrünstigkeit aufgezehrt, dass sie sich selbst durch schrecklichste Verwundungen vorwärts kämpfen.
fluff.es: Tan dominados por una furiosa sed de sangre están estos asesinos que luchan incluso tras sufrir las heridas mortales más graves.
fluff.fr: Ces tueurs ont une telle soif de sang qu’ils lutteront en dépit des blessures les plus graves.
fluff.it: Questi assassini sono talmente pervasi dalla sete di sangue che continuano a combattere nonostante le ferite mortali subite.
fluff.ja: この殺戮者たちは狂乱の流血衝動に憑りつかれており、いかなる重傷を負ったとしても戦い続ける。
fluff.ko: 격노 어린 피의 갈망에 사로잡힌 이 전사는 치명상에도 불구하고 계속해서 싸워 나간다.
fluff.zh: 这些杀手迷失在了狂怒的嗜血欲望中，就算伤势严重也会继续战斗。

description.en:
World Eaters Daemon Prince model only. This model has:
  • Mobile.
  • +1 to charge rolls.
description.de:
Nur für ein World-Eaters-Dämonenprinz-Modell. Dieses Modell hat:
  • Mobil.
  • +1 auf Angriffswürfe.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Príncipe Daemon de los Devoradores de Mundos. Esta miniatura tiene:
  • Móvil.
  • +1 a las tiradas de carga.
description.fr:
Figurine de Prince Démon World Eater seulement. Cette figurine a :
  • Le mot-clé Mobile.
  • +1 aux jets de charge.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Principe Demone dei World Eaters. Questo modello ha:
  • Agile.
  • +1 ai tiri per caricare.
description.ja:
ワールドイーター・ディーモンプリンス・兵のみ。この兵は：
  • 高機動を持つ。
  • 突撃ロールに+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko:
월드 이터 데몬 대공 모델 전용. 이 모델에 다음을 부여합니다.
  • 기동
  • 돌격 굴림 +1
description.zh:
仅限吞世者恶魔亲王模型。该模型拥有：
  • 机动。
  • 冲锋掷骰 +1。

name.ja: 殺戮の聖別（アップグレード）

description.en: Terminator Squad unit only. This unit has +1 OC.
description.de: Nur für eine Terminatortrupp-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat +1 MK.
description.es: Solo unidad Escuadra de Exterminadores. Esta unidad tiene +1 a CO.
description.fr: Unité d’Escouade Terminator seulement. Cette unité a +1 en CO.
description.it: Solo unità Squadra Terminator. Questa unità ha +1 CO.
description.ja: ターミネイター・スカッド・ユニットのみ。このユニットの【確】は+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 터미네이터 분대 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 장악 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限终结者小队单位。该单位的 OC 属性 +1。

name.ja: 流血で鍛えられし精髄（アップグレード）

description.en: <k>World Eaters Vehicle</k> unit only. This unit has <k>Daemon</k>.
description.de: Nur für eine <k>World</k>-<k>Eaters</k>-<k>Fahrzeug</k>-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat <k>Dämon</k>.
description.es: Solo unidad <k>Vehículo Devoradores de Mundos</k>. Esta unidad tiene <k>Daemon</k>.
description.fr: Unité de <k>Véhicule</k> des <k>World Eaters</k> seulement. Cette unité a le mot-clé <k>Démon</k>.
description.it: Solo unità <k>Veicolo</k> dei <k>World Eaters</k>. Questa unità ha <k>Demone</k>.
description.ja: <k>ワールドイーター・ビークル</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットは<k>ディーモン</k>を持つ。
description.ko: <k>월드 이터 기체</k> 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 <k>데몬</k>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限<k>吞世者载具</k>单位。该单位拥有<k>恶魔</k>关键词。

name.ja: 虐殺の鉤爪（アップグレード）

description.en: Maulerfiend unit only. This unit’s Maulerfiend Fists have [Cleave 2].
description.de: Nur für eine Klauenmonstrum-Einheit. Die Klauenmonstrum-Fäuste dieser Einheit haben [Spalten 2].
description.es: Solo unidad Diablo Despedazador. Los Puños de Diablo Despedazador de esta unidad tienen [Tajar 2].
description.fr: Unité de Ferrocerberus seulement. Les Poings de Ferrocerberus de cette unité ont [Abattage 2].
description.it: Solo unità di Diavolo Distruttore. I magli del Diavolo Distruttore di questa unità hanno [Falciare 2].
description.ja: モーラーフィーンド・ユニットのみ。このユニットのモーラーフィーンド・フィストは［蹂躙2］を持つ。
description.ko: 절지마물 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 절지마물 주먹에 [베어가르기 2]를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限重拳恶魔单位。该单位的重拳恶魔之拳拥有[劈砍 2]技能。

name.ja: 血肉に塗れし古参兵（アップグレード）

description.en: Terminator Squad unit only. This unit’s melee attacks have +1 WS.
description.de: Nur für eine Terminatortrupp-Einheit. Die Nahkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben +1 KG.
description.es: Solo unidad Escuadra de Exterminadores. Los ataques de combate de esta unidad tienen +1 a HA.
description.fr: Unité d’Escouade Terminator seulement. Les attaques de mêlée de cette unité ont +1 en CC.
description.it: Solo unità Squadra Terminator. Gli attacchi da mischia di questa unità hanno +1 AC.
description.ja: ターミネイター・スカッド・ユニットのみ。このユニットの白兵攻撃の【接】は+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 터미네이터 분대 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 백병전 공격에 근접 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限终结者小队单位。该单位近战攻击的 WS 属性 +1。

description.en: World Eaters model only. (Once per battle, per army) In your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, every Blessing of Khorne is active for this unit until the start of your next turn.
description.de: Nur für ein World-Eaters-Modell. (Einmal pro Schlacht pro Armee) In deiner Befehlsphase kannst du diese Fähigkeit einsetzen. Wenn du dies tust, ist bis zum Beginn deines nächsten Zugs für diese Einheit jeder ­Segen des Khorne aktiv.
description.es: Solo miniatura Devoradores de Mundos. (Una vez por batalla, por ejército). En tu fase de mando, puedes usar esta habilidad. Si lo haces, todas las Bendiciones de Khorne están activas para esta unidad hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno.
description.fr: Figurine de World Eater seulement. (Une fois par bataille, par armée) À votre phase de Commandement, vous pouvez utiliser cette aptitude. Dans ce cas, toutes les Bénédictions de Khorne sont actives pour cette unité jusqu’au début de votre prochain tour.
description.it: Solo modelli dei World Eaters. (Una volta per battaglia, per armata). Puoi usare questa abilità nella tua fase di Comando. Se lo fai, tutte le Benedizioni di Khorne sono attive per questa unità fino all’inizio del tuo prossimo turno.
description.ja: ワールドイーター・兵のみ。（アーミーごとに、バトル中1回限り）自軍側指揮フェイズ中、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用した場合、次の自軍側ターン開始時まで、このユニットにすべての『コーン神の祝福』が適用される。
description.ko: 월드 이터 모델 전용(군대를 통틀어 전투당 한 번). 플레이어의 지휘 페이즈에, 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 플레이어의 다음 턴이 시작될 때까지 이 유닛에 코온의 축복이 활성화됩니다.
description.zh: 仅限吞世者模型。（每支军队，每场战斗限一次）在您的指挥阶段中，您可以使用该技能。如果您这样做，在您的下一个回合开始前，所有恐虐祝福都对该单位生效。

description.en: **WORLD EATERS** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons (excluding Extra Attacks weapons) equipped by the bearer.
**WORLD EATERS** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
**WORLD EATERS** model only. Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll up to two of the D6 rolled.

**WORLD EATERS** model only. You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit. In addition, while the Unbridled Bloodlust Blessing of Khorne is active for your army, add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.
**WORLD EATERS MONSTER** model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer’s Aura abilities.

**WORLD EATERS INFANTRY** model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a **JAKHALS** or **GOREMONGERS** unit. If attached to a **GOREMONGERS** unit, the bearer has the Infiltrators ability.
**WORLD EATERS MONSTER** model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Toughness characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

**WORLD EATERS** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **JAKHALS** and/or **GOREMONGERS** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

**WORLD EATERS** model only. While a friendly **BLOOD LEGIONS** unit is within 6" of the bearer, that unit has the Blessings of Khorne ability. If the Might of Khorne ability is active for your army, then while a friendly **BLOOD LEGIONS** unit is within 6" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.
**BLOOD LEGIONS** or **WORLD EATERS** model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+. If the bearer is destroyed, you gain 1 Blood Tithe point.

**LORD ON JUGGERNAUT** model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a **BLOODCRUSHERS** or **FLESH HOUNDS** unit. While leading one of these units, the bearer has the Deep Strike ability, and it has the **BLOOD LEGIONS** Faction keyword instead of the **WORLD EATERS** Faction keyword.

**WORLD EATERS** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit with a melee attack, do not roll to gain a Blood Tithe point, you automatically gain 1 Blood Tithe point instead.
**SLAUGHTERBOUND** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Brazen Fury move, it is treated as having rolled a 6 for the distance the unit can be moved.
**WORLD EATERS DAEMON** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.
**WORLD EATERS DAEMON** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

**WORLD EATERS DAEMON** model only. The bearer’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 2+ instead of on a 6. In addition, the bearer has the Deadly Demise D3+1 ability, instead of the Deadly Demise D3 ability.

**WORLD EATERS** model only. If the bearer’s unit disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.
**WORLD EATERS** model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a **DEDICATED TRANSPORT,** that **DEDICATED TRANSPORT** has the Scouts 9" ability.

**WORLD EATERS** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one **VEHICLE** model within 6" of the bearer or, if the bearer is embarked within a **TRANSPORT,** you can select that **TRANSPORT** model. Until the end of the phase, after the selected model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

**WORLD EATERS** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer’s unit has the Fights First ability.

At the start of the battle round, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if this model is destroyed, you can use a triple 6 from that roll to use this ability instead of activating any Blessings of Khorne at the start of that battle round. If you do, this model is no longer destroyed and in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, it is set up anywhere on the battlefield using its Deep Strike ability, with 8 wounds remaining.
At the start of the battle round, select one Wrathful Presence ability. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.
Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if this model is on the battlefield, you can re-roll up to six of the D6 rolled.
Each time an enemy unit within 6" of this model is selected to Fall Back, that unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

While a friendly **WORLD EATERS** unit is within 6" of this model, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that unit’s Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it, and each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Weapon Skill characteristic and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.
If this model is in your army, it must be your **WARLORD**.
While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Armed with the sword Samni’arius and the axe Spinegrinder, he can carve through entire armies of foes in a whirlwind of apocalyptic bloodshed.

Strung with trophies taken from those slain by the savage warriors the tanks carry to the front line, Land Raiders are the gore‐encrusted spear tip of many World Eaters assaults.

To this end, they unleash lascannon beams with reckless fury, grinding infantry beneath their metallic tracks as they rumble towards their chosen prey.

fluff.en: The crews of World Eaters vehicles lust for carnage and bloodshed, preferring to unleash their vehicle’s firepower at close range. Rumbling into battle on gore‐slick tracks, Predator Destructors unload torrents of fire into infantry formations and enemy war machines, suppressing their targets as the World Eaters’ infantry thunder into the fray.

fluff.en: Rhinos are well‐adapted for battlefield transportation. Even when corrupted by the Warp and encrusted with dried blood, they remain as reliable as ever, safely carrying their passengers over fire‐swept terrain. Many of these vehicles are adorned with blades and have machine spirits just as bloodthirsty as their occupants.

fluff.en: Becoming a Chaos Spawn is the dark fate of many upon the Path to Glory. Wracked with the endless gifts of the Dark Gods, they are mutated mounds of muscle, writhing pseudopods, slathering maws and far more. Chaos Spawn are herded towards their terrified foes, advancing in loping runs, seeking to tear, crush and consume.

fluff.en: The champions of World Eaters warbands highly prize Terminator armour. When clad in this corrupted plate, such a champion becomes a walking tank, impervious to all but the heaviest incoming fire. The Blood God’s Terminators wield a powerful array of heavy firepower and brutal melee weapons with which they tear through elite squads and carve through armoured war machines.

For their deeds, the Lord of Rage has rewarded them with infernal immortality and might. In battle, Daemon Princes lead their warbands in devastating assaults, striding unharmed through enemy attack.

fluff.en: Virtually unrecognisable from the World Eaters they once were, Eightbound are Chaos Space Marines whose form is possessed by eight daemons of Khorne. As a result, they have incredible strength and savagery far in excess of others in their warband. Carrying all manner of chain weapons, they rip apart any who stand against them.

These airborne Daemon Engines excel at intercepting the enemy’s aerial assets, tearing them from the air and incinerating their crew. World Eaters Heldrakes are ever eager to swoop down into the thick of the fighting, tearing and ripping with razor-sharp talons to sate the bloodlust of their possessing daemons.

Such an infernal fusion lends the host colossal strength and insatiable rage, driving them to reckless butchery. Containing such power requires great force of will, however, and the demise of such a warrior is often explosive.
